title: LORRY DRIVER
description:
Responsibility
As a Lorry Driver, you will play a vital role in the distribution of our food products, goods to various locations. Your responsibilities will include safe transportation of goods, adherence to delivery schedules, and ensuring the quality of products during transit. This position requires a strong commitment to safety, excellent driving skills, and a focus on delivering products in optimal condition.

Job Description

  • Safely operate and maintain a lorry (delivery truck) to transport Food products, goods, ensuring compliance with all traffic and safety regulations.
  • Assist in the loading and unloading of baked products onto the lorry, ensuring proper handling and securing of goods to prevent damage during transit.
  • Plan delivery routes to maximize efficiency and meet delivery schedules. Familiarize yourself with delivery locations and navigate using GPS or maps.
  • Ensure that baked goods are stored and transported in a manner that preserves.
  • Maintain accurate delivery records, including receipts, delivery notes, and invoices. Collect payments when required and issue receipts.
  • Perform routine maintenance checks on the lorry, including inspections, oil changes, and tire rotations. Report any mechanical issues for prompt repairs.
  • Provide courteous and professional customer service when interacting with clients or receiving product deliveries.
  • Adhere to all safety protocols and traffic regulations to maintain a safe working environment and prevent accidents.
  • Assist in monitoring and maintaining inventory levels in the delivery truck. Coordinate with the warehouse or production team for restocking.
  • Assist in warehouse or shop, if no delivery schedule.
  • Able to carry heavy goods, roughly 20KG - 40KG.
  • Able to work in pressure environment and need work under the sun.
  • Need work at public holiday, weekend and overtime.
  • Able to work night and rotating shifts
  • Working Location: Islandwide, 1ST trip will start at 6 am-630am

Requirement

  • At least 3 Year(s) working experience and related field are required for this position.
  • Must possess at least higher Education/ Diploma in any field.
  • Possess a Singapore Class 3 driving license or able to take Class 3 Driving License.
  • Familiar driving on Singapore roads or able to use GPS.
  • Strategic & critical thinking as well as decision-making and negotiation skills.
  • Able to adapt, prioritize, exercise initiative, manage pressure, multi task and work independently.
  • Excellent customer service skills, including communication skills, problem solving skills, organizational skills and teamwork spirit.
  • Time management/ meticulous and mature in work.

postedCompany.description:
Nayaka Services is a licensed employment agency and ticketing agent in Singapore. Nayaka Services is a member of the Tripartite Alliance for Fair and Progressive Employment Practices (TAFEP) in Singapore. It is one of the approved agency by Ministry of Manpower to deploy Household Service Scheme (HSS) workers for domestic cleaning services.


It has strong manpower partner relationships in countries such as China, Bangladesh, Indonesia, India, Myanmar, Taiwan, Sri Lanka, Philippines.


Nayaka Services is accredited with Sri Lanka High Commission and Embassy of the Philippines which aids in our recruitment and deployment of foreign manpower in Singapore.
postedCompany.name: NAYAKA SERVICES PTE. LTD.
